notes: This local snapshot is the canonical source for semantic judge evaluation. When wording differs from upstream workflow behavior, this repository's PRD, architecture, and story contracts remain authoritative.

laws.title: No disconnected mount queries
laws.wording: NO database queries in disconnected mount -- use assign_async

laws.title: Use streams for large lists
laws.wording: ALWAYS use streams for lists >100 items

laws.title: Guard PubSub subscribe with connected?
laws.wording: CHECK connected?/1 before PubSub subscribe

laws.title: No float money fields
laws.wording: NEVER use :float for money -- use :decimal or :integer (cents)

laws.title: Pin query values
laws.wording: ALWAYS pin values with ^ in queries -- never interpolate user input

laws.title: Correct association query shape
laws.wording: SEPARATE QUERIES for has_many, JOIN for belongs_to

laws.title: Oban jobs are idempotent
laws.wording: Jobs MUST be idempotent

laws.title: Oban args use string keys
laws.wording: Oban args use STRING keys

laws.title: No structs in Oban args
laws.wording: Never store structs in Oban args

laws.title: No String.to_atom with user input
laws.wording: NO String.to_atom with user input -- atom exhaustion DoS

laws.title: Authorize every handle_event
laws.wording: AUTHORIZE in EVERY LiveView handle_event

laws.title: No raw/1 on untrusted input
laws.wording: NEVER use raw/1 with untrusted content -- XSS

laws.title: No process without runtime reason
laws.wording: NO process without runtime reason -- processes model concurrency/state/isolation

laws.title: Supervise long-lived processes
laws.wording: SUPERVISE ALL LONG-LIVED PROCESSES

laws.title: No implicit cross joins
laws.wording: NO IMPLICIT CROSS JOINS -- from(a in A, b in B) without on: creates Cartesian product

laws.title: Track compile-time files
laws.wording: @external_resource FOR COMPILE-TIME FILES

laws.title: Dedup before cast_assoc
laws.wording: DEDUP BEFORE cast_assoc WITH SHARED DATA

laws.title: Use hidden inputs for required embeds
laws.wording: HIDDEN INPUTS FOR ALL REQUIRED EMBEDDED FIELDS

laws.title: Wrap third-party APIs
laws.wording: WRAP THIRD-PARTY LIBRARY APIs behind project-owned modules

laws.title: No attempt-guarded snooze loops
laws.wording: Smart Engine workers must not combine {:snooze, _} retries with attempt-based guards that can loop forever

laws.title: No assign_new for per-mount refresh values
laws.wording: NEVER use assign_new for values refreshed every mount

laws.title: Verify before claiming done
laws.wording: VERIFY BEFORE CLAIMING DONE -- run mix compile && mix test, never say should work
